channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Measles outbreak infects over 60 children in Enfield amid low vaccination rates
item.description: A measles outbreak has affected more than 60 children in north London, particularly in the Enfield area, where cases have been reported across seven schools and a nursery. Several children required ho...

item.title: Bianca Censori Named as Witness in Kanye West’s Legal Case Over Former Employee Claims
item.description: Bianca Censori has been called as a potential witness in her husband Kanye West’s ongoing legal dispute with his former project manager, Tony Saxon. Saxon’s lawsuit alleges unsafe and unethical workin...

item.title: Thousands of Immigrants Detained Illegally by ICE in First Five Months of Trump’s Term
item.description: Between October of the previous year and February 2026, U.S. immigration authorities (ICE) have been found to have illegally detained over 4,400 immigrants, according to federal court rulings. In many...

item.title: Aging Farmer Faces Health Challenges While Maintaining Multi-Generational Family Farm
item.description: Don Guinnip, a 74-year-old farmer in Marshall, Illinois, continues to work on the family farm that has been in his family since 1837, managing 1,000 acres of corn and soybeans along with 40 cattle. De...

item.title: Highlights from LGA’s Capital One Lounge, Airline Rankings, Qatar Airways Amenities, and Must-Try Foods

item.title: British Museum reviews and updates Middle East gallery terminology after concerns raised by UK Lawyers for Israel
item.description: The British Museum has confirmed that it is reviewing and updating terminology used in some of its Middle East gallery displays after concerns were raised by UK Lawyers for Israel (UKLFI), a UK-based ...

item.title: Colombian Congresswoman Ángela Vergara Appeals for Help After Son Detained by ICE
item.description: Colombian Congresswoman Ángela Vergara has publicly appealed for help after her son, Rafael Alfonso Vergara, was detained by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). In a video shared on social...

item.title: Photographer Captures Meteor Appearing to Enter Mount Merapi During Long-Exposure Shot
item.description: Photographer Gunarto Song captured a striking long-exposure photograph of Mount Merapi, a highly active stratovolcano in Indonesia, showing a meteor streaking across the night sky. While the meteor mo...

item.title: Report Claims Over 50,000 Foreign Nationals Served in Israeli Forces During Gaza War
item.description: The article reports that more than 50,000 individuals holding foreign passports served in the Israeli army during the war in Gaza. Citing data published by the investigative outlet Declassified UK, it...

item.title: Reflections on KillBait’s First Year: AI, Clickbait, and Community Feedback
item.description: KillBait, launched on January 1, 2025, is a news aggregator created by a team of journalism and web development professionals aiming to address clickbait in online media using artificial intelligence....

item.title: Federal Judge Dismisses Minneapolis ICE Assault Case After Video Contradicts Officers’ Testimony
